title: HOMELESS SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: HEART OF THE CITY HOMELESS SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Distributes personal care items such as toothbrushes, deodorant, and snacks. Coats, sleeping bags & tents. Also provides specialized information and referral, including referrals to counseling resources. 28925 SW Boberg Road Wilsonville, OR 97070 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (503) 582-8680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 582-8680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and complete intake form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Aurora, Donald, Hubbard, and Wilsonville Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEART OF THE CITY
